summaryShort: Excavator operator was traveling down a haul road when the machine veered off the road and fell over a 317-foot highwall.
summaryDetailed: Equipment operator lost control on a highwall, highlighting the need for berms and edge protection.
fieldObservationTemplates: Excavator operator was traveling down a haul road when the machine veered off the road and fell over a 317-foot highwall.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the operator was speeding without evidence.

incidentType: Miner was killed by a fall of
summaryShort: Miner was killed by a fall of roof material while working near the active mining face.
summaryDetailed: Failure of secondary roof support in unstable ground resulted in fatal strike.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner was killed by a fall of roof material while working near the active mining face.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer geological survey error.

summaryShort: Two powered haulage vehicles collided at a blind intersection in the pit area.
summaryDetailed: Failure of traffic management systems at a blind intersection caused a fatal collision.
fieldObservationTemplates: Two powered haulage vehicles collided at a blind intersection in the pit area.

summaryShort: Contractor was engulfed while entering a confined space vessel without following entry permit procedures.
summaryDetailed: Unauthorized entry into confined space without permit resulted in fatal engulfment.
fieldObservationTemplates: Contractor was engulfed while entering a confined space vessel without following entry permit procedures.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer absence of attendant without findings.

summaryShort: Operator died in an explosion when explosives were handled improperly during a blasting sequence.
summaryDetailed: Improper handling of explosive materials led to an unplanned detonation.
fieldObservationTemplates: Operator died in an explosion when explosives were handled improperly during a blasting sequence.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the explosive type is defective.

summaryShort: Worker was fatally injured when an unsecured gas cylinder fell and ruptured, creating a projectile.
summaryDetailed: Lack of securement allowed the pressurized cylinder to fall, rupturing and becoming a projectile.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker was fatally injured when an unsecured gas cylinder fell and ruptured, creating a projectile.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer cylinder contents were toxic unless specified.

summaryShort: Highwall face collapse trapped operator during overburden removal.
summaryDetailed: Instability of highwall face caused fatal entrapment.
fieldObservationTemplates: Highwall face collapse trapped operator during overburden removal.

incidentType: Miner struck by runaway rail c
summaryShort: Miner struck by runaway rail car while setting track block.
summaryDetailed: Inadequate car control system led to collision with worker.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner struck by runaway rail car while setting track block.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer braking system fault.

summaryShort: Electrical arc flash during high voltage splice repair.
summaryDetailed: Incomplete de-energization resulted in arc flash during cable repair.
fieldObservationTemplates: Electrical arc flash during high voltage splice repair.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer splice kit failure.

summaryShort: Worker crushed between conveyor belt and frame during belt tracking adjustment.
summaryDetailed: Belt tracking while running without proper protection caused fatal crush.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker crushed between conveyor belt and frame during belt tracking adjustment.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer conveyor automation status.

summaryShort: Worker inhaled high concentration of dust during dry sweeping operation.
summaryDetailed: Dry sweeping generates high levels of silica, requiring control measures.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker inhaled high concentration of dust during dry sweeping operation.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer existing lung pathology.

incidentType: Miner was entangled in a belt
summaryShort: Miner was entangled in a belt conveyor tail pulley while cleaning material without stopping the belt.
summaryDetailed: Cleaning conveyor while in motion is a high-risk activity without LOTO.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner was entangled in a belt conveyor tail pulley while cleaning material without stopping the belt.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer conveyor automation status.

summaryShort: Haul truck flipped over after driving off a haulage ramp edge due to lack of berms.
summaryDetailed: Road edge protection failure caused fatal haul truck overturn.
fieldObservationTemplates: Haul truck flipped over after driving off a haulage ramp edge due to lack of berms.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer truck mechanical health.

incidentType: Miner died when a section of t
summaryShort: Miner died when a section of the drift roof collapsed while setting timber supports.
summaryDetailed: Collapse of roof during support activity indicates failure of ground control planning.
fieldObservationTemplates: Miner died when a section of the drift roof collapsed while setting timber supports.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer poor support quality without review.

incidentType: Operator was struck during a b
summaryShort: Operator was struck during a blasting sequence due to premature detonation of misfired charge.
summaryDetailed: Misfire handling procedure failure resulted in fatal explosion strike.
fieldObservationTemplates: Operator was struck during a blasting sequence due to premature detonation of misfired charge.

incidentType: Worker was fatally struck by s
summaryShort: Worker was fatally struck by shifting stock-piled material while clearing equipment at the base of the pile.
summaryDetailed: Working at base of unstable stockpile without awareness of material shifting hazard.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker was fatally struck by shifting stock-piled material while clearing equipment at the base of the pile.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer the stockpile height.

summaryShort: Battery charging bay caught fire due to short circuit in charging lead.
summaryDetailed: Electrical fault in charging leads caused fire spread.
fieldObservationTemplates: Battery charging bay caught fire due to short circuit in charging lead.

summaryShort: Operator trapped after highwall face sloughed onto machinery path.
summaryDetailed: Failure to scale highwall face prior to entry resulted in fatal fall of ground.
fieldObservationTemplates: Operator trapped after highwall face sloughed onto machinery path.

summaryShort: Mechanic entangled in tail pulley while adjusting belt tension on active conveyor.
summaryDetailed: Belt tracking during operation is high-risk and requires LOTO.
fieldObservationTemplates: Mechanic entangled in tail pulley while adjusting belt tension on active conveyor.

summaryShort: Worker struck by 200lb tire rolling from improperly blocked stockpile area.
summaryDetailed: Improper blocking of heavy tires in storage allowed uncontrolled movement.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker struck by 200lb tire rolling from improperly blocked stockpile area.

summaryShort: Worker drowned after falling into sediment pond; no personal flotation device available.
summaryDetailed: Work near water without mandatory PFD is a fatal hazard.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker drowned after falling into sediment pond; no personal flotation device available.

incidentType: Belt drive caught fire due to
summaryShort: Belt drive caught fire due to friction buildup during maintenance.
summaryDetailed: Friction on belt drive created fire risk without thermal monitoring.
fieldObservationTemplates: Belt drive caught fire due to friction buildup during maintenance.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer suppression system type.

summaryShort: Operator trapped when highwall bench collapsed during scaling.
summaryDetailed: Scaling activity without stable base triggered fatal highwall failure.
fieldObservationTemplates: Operator trapped when highwall bench collapsed during scaling.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer scaling method error.

summaryShort: Maintenance worker bypassed LOTO and energized equipment during repairs.
summaryDetailed: Working on machinery without energy isolation is a fatal risk.
fieldObservationTemplates: Maintenance worker bypassed LOTO and energized equipment during repairs.

summaryShort: Haul truck crashed through road barrier into ditch.
summaryDetailed: Barrier design failed to contain runaway vehicle, resulting in fatal crash.
fieldObservationTemplates: Haul truck crashed through road barrier into ditch.

summaryShort: Worker reached into rotating conveyor pulley and was entangled.
summaryDetailed: Accessing rotating components while running without guarding is a lethal entanglement hazard.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker reached into rotating conveyor pulley and was entangled.

incidentType: Miner struck by falling rock d
summaryShort: Miner struck by falling rock during roof support installation.

fieldObservationTemplates: Miner struck by falling rock during roof support installation.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer drill rig fault.

summaryShort: Haul truck rolled over embankment due to missing berm at roadway edge.
summaryDetailed: Failure to provide road edge containment leads to haul vehicle rollover.
fieldObservationTemplates: Haul truck rolled over embankment due to missing berm at roadway edge.

summaryShort: Maintenance personnel contacted live bus bar without applying required lockout locks.
summaryDetailed: Working on energized bus without LOTO is lethal.
fieldObservationTemplates: Maintenance personnel contacted live bus bar without applying required lockout locks.

summaryShort: Operator fell into conveyor drive while performing routine cleaning without LOTO.
summaryDetailed: Proximity to rotating drive parts without LOTO is high hazard.
fieldObservationTemplates: Operator fell into conveyor drive while performing routine cleaning without LOTO.

summaryShort: Mechanic caught between moving pulley and frame during belt check.
summaryDetailed: Adjustment of belt while in operation leads to fatal pinch.
fieldObservationTemplates: Mechanic caught between moving pulley and frame during belt check.

summaryShort: Electrical fire in substation due to improper cable insulation maintenance.
summaryDetailed: Maintenance failure on electrical insulation caused fatal fire.
fieldObservationTemplates: Electrical fire in substation due to improper cable insulation maintenance.
prohibitedOverreach: Do not infer fire suppression failure.

summaryShort: Worker crushed when bench scaling failure allowed massive rock face fall.
summaryDetailed: Inadequate scaling procedures for highwall stability resulted in fatal strike.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker crushed when bench scaling failure allowed massive rock face fall.

summaryShort: Maintenance personnel crushed while working on unsecured equipment without LOTO.
summaryDetailed: Failure to apply LOTO during equipment maintenance created a fatal hazard.
fieldObservationTemplates: Maintenance personnel crushed while working on unsecured equipment without LOTO.

summaryShort: Haul truck struck a stationary vehicle due to blind corner speed and no traffic control.
summaryDetailed: Traffic plan absent at high-risk zone leading to fatal collision.
fieldObservationTemplates: Haul truck struck a stationary vehicle due to blind corner speed and no traffic control.

summaryShort: Worker entangled in rotating conveyor pulley guard during machine run.
summaryDetailed: Entanglement at conveyor pulley because guard system was inadequate.
fieldObservationTemplates: Worker entangled in rotating conveyor pulley guard during machine run.

summaryShort: Electrician sustained arc flash injuries when opening an energized distribution cabinet without LOTO.
summaryDetailed: Opening energized equipment without LOTO isolation caused lethal arc flash.

summaryShort: Scaling operation on highwall triggered bench collapse, engulfing the scaling equipment operator.
summaryDetailed: Scaling failure caused fatal highwall bench collapse.

summaryShort: Maintenance worker injured due to LOTO failure during mechanical equipment service.
summaryDetailed: Equipment maintenance without energy isolation is a fatal risk.

summaryShort: Haul truck crashed at intersection due to failing to yield in high-traffic pit area.
summaryDetailed: Lack of traffic discipline at pit intersections causes fatal mobile equipment collisions.

summaryShort: Mechanic caught between moving pulley and frame during conveyor tracking.
summaryDetailed: Tracking conveyors while running without guard protection leads to entanglement.
fieldObservationTemplates: Mechanic caught between moving pulley and frame during conveyor tracking.

incidentType: Miner fatal struck by roof sec
summaryShort: Miner fatal struck by roof section failure; roof bolting plan not followed.
summaryDetailed: Failure to follow approved support plan allowed roof collapse.

incidentType: Haul truck lost control on sli

summaryDetailed: Roadway lacks edge protection (berms) to contain equipment loss.

summaryShort: Haul truck struck a stationary vehicle at intersection due to blind spot speed.
summaryDetailed: Traffic control absent at intersection leads to fatal mobile equipment collision.

incidentType: Substation fire due to short c
summaryShort: Substation fire due to short circuit, no suppression used.
summaryDetailed: Inadequate maintenance of electrical components led to fire.

summaryShort: Bench scaling operation triggered highwall fall of ground killing operator.
summaryDetailed: Scaling of unstable bench caused sudden rock fall.

summaryShort: Maintenance worker bypassed lockout during equipment repair.
summaryDetailed: Bypassing LOTO for repairs leads to fatal equipment activation.

summaryShort: Miner died when caught between longwall plow and chain assembly.

summaryShort: Operator fatally struck by collapsing highwall during scaling operations.

summaryShort: Electrician caught by energized drill motor after bypass of safety interlock.

summaryShort: Berm failure allowed haul truck to drive off highwall edge.

summaryShort: Equipment maintenance on unblocked drive system led to crush.
